SEVEN TO EIGHT TREES DOWNED NEAR MADAWASKA LAKE ON LAKESHORE DRIVE AND ROUTE 161 FROM STRONG THUNDERSTORM WINDS. TREES AS LARGE AS THREE TO FOUR FEET IN DIAMETER WERE UPROOTED OR SNAPPED. ELECTRIC AND COMMUNICATION LINES WERE ALSO TAKEN DOWN...AND LAKESHORE DRIVE WAS BLOCKED.
HAIL LASTED FOR A MINUTE TO A MINUTE AND A HALF.

GENERAL PUBLIC POSTED A PICTURE OF LARGE HAILSTONES VIA FACEBOOK. HAIL SIZE IS ODDLY SHAPED BUT ESTIMATED TO BE PING PONG SIZE ON MINOR AXIS. HOWEVER, HAIL HAD SIGNIFICANT PROTRUSIONS WITH A LONGER MAJOR AXIS.
